title: Freeze Zephyr boot manifest and evidence schema
description: Generate the canonical inventory for project-LICHEN-m5m1 from tracked CMake/prj.conf/testcase/sample/board files. Assign each firmware root and declared backend a stable result row and define accepted boot oracles. This is coverage control: no firmware or target may disappear from the final report.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Manifest includes 3 production apps, lora_ping, test_blink, and all 37 Zephyr test roots. 2. Declared board fragments and executable backends are mapped. 3. Every row has command, revision, artifact/log location, oracle, and WIN/FAIL/BLOCKED fields. 4. Inventory is independently reconciled against tracked files.
notes: CANONICAL MANIFEST at source revision 8e02a7ae924a226c91c23d8d19f0f5350c248364 (branch wip/checkpoint-20260715). Total firmware roots: 42. Production roots: firmware/bridge-zephyr; lichen/apps/gateway; lichen/apps/puck. Sample: lichen/samples/lora_ping. Diagnostic: lichen/apps/test_blink. Runtime test roots (37): app_identity, app_interface, ble_app_owner, ble_ingress, ble_ipsp_transport, build_epoch, coap_client, gateway_config, gateway_status, gnss_emul, hal, hal_reset_unavailable, hal_serial_precedence, icmpv6, inbound_lci_location, kiss_transport, link_crypto, meshcore_adapter, meshcore_ble, meshcore_codec, meshcore_gateway_adapter, meshtastic_adapter, meshtastic_ble, meshtastic_codec, meshtastic_gateway_adapter, native_init, native_parse, nvs_persistence, oscore, ping_l2, puck_location, routing_announce, routing_fwd_buffer, routing_gpsr, schc_generic, slip_transport, util. Test manifests define 62 scenarios and 234 runtime-platform declarations across native_sim, native_sim/native/64, qemu_x86, and qemu_x86_64. Production target groups: bridge fragments = heltec_t114, heltec_vision_master_e213, heltec_vision_master_e290, heltec_wifi_lora32_v3_esp32s3_procpu, heltec_wireless_tracker, lilygo_tbeam, rak19007_wisblock, rak4631_nrf52840, seeed_t1000e, seeed_wio_tracker_1110, station_g2, t_deck_esp32s3_procpu, t_echo_nrf52840, xiao_s3_wio_sx1262 plus generic native_sim/qemu smoke paths; gateway = native_sim, native_sim/native/64, qemu_x86, nrf52840dk/nrf52840, nucleo_wl55jc, r1_neo/nrf52840, t1000_e/nrf52840, t_echo/nrf52840, heltec_wifi_lora32_v3/esp32s3/procpu, t_deck/esp32s3/procpu; puck = native_sim build path plus rak4631/nrf52840, nucleo_wl55jc, r1_neo/nrf52840, t1000_e/nrf52840, t_echo/nrf52840, heltec_wifi_lora32_v3/esp32s3/procpu, t_deck/esp32s3/procpu, ttgo_lora32/esp32/procpu, orphaned tbeam_supreme. lora_ping declares T1000-E hardware and tracked Renode paths; test_blink declares T1000-E hardware. RESULT ROW SCHEMA, mandatory for every root/target: firmware_root | target/backend | exact command | source revision | artifact SHA-256 | log/evidence location | independent oracle | WIN/FAIL/BLOCKED | linked remediation/dependency. Accepted WIN oracles: passing ztest/console harness; externally observed late production marker plus live process; validated protocol response; external lichen-sim firmware-driven TX; physical post-reset USB/protocol response or independently observed diagnostic effect. Build/link success, process liveness alone, flash-tool success, and platform parsing are not boot proof. Independent reconciliation: three exploration passes plus direct Glob count of 37 testcase manifests and tracked app/sample/board fragments. Execution ownership: .5 tests; .7 bridge; .4 gateway; .2 puck; .3 lora_ping; .1 test_blink; .8 complete board/result reconciliation; .9 publication/review/cleanup.
close_reason: Frozen canonical 42-root manifest, 62-scenario test inventory, production board groups, evidence schema, accepted runtime oracles, and execution ownership at revision 8e02a7a; independently reconciled by three inventories plus direct tracked-file counts.
